stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
On the display device of the TCAS 2 (Traffic Collision Avoidance System), you see a solid cyan diamond. What does this represent?

options.a: Other traffic within 5 NM and 1000 ft vertically
options.b: Proximate traffic, within 6 NM and 1200 ft vertically
options.c: Other traffic within 5 NM and 2700 ft vertically
options.d: Traffic alert within 35-45 seconds from the first encounter with the traffic
